name: svg-mcp
description: Structured, hierarchical SVG authoring for an LLM with a render-and-see feedback loop, backed by an inkex document model.

hooks.command: if command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1; then uv sync --project "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}" --quiet >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; else printf '{"systemMessage":"svg-mcp plugin: `uv` is required but was not found on PATH — the svg-mcp MCP server will not start. Install uv: https://docs.astral.sh/uv/getting-started/installation/"}'; fi
